symptoms: Product consistently soft — never quite freezes to serve texture.

tests.error-log: No hard faults. Repeated PRODUCT TEMP HIGH warnings over the past month.
tests.temp-probe: Barrel at −2 °C — should be −6 to −8 °C. Suction pressure low.
tests.continuity-test: All electrical fine. Refrigerant pressures confirm undercharge — suction pressure well below spec.

authenticityNote: Low refrigerant from a slow leak degrades over weeks; the machine keeps running but can't hit barrel temperature. Low suction pressure is the key read — not the soft product alone, which could be a dozen other things.
